LightningComponentBundle.description: A three-step wizard component with visual progress indicator, navigation controls, and step content management. Provides guided workflow experience with accessibility support.

property.name: step1Label
property.label: Step 1 Label
property.description: Label for the first step of the wizard

property.name: step2Label
property.label: Step 2 Label
property.description: Label for the second step of the wizard

property.name: step3Label
property.label: Step 3 Label
property.description: Label for the third step of the wizard
